pageContext.name: Frankie Reborn
pageContext.description: She's aliiiiive!  Sideshow Art Prints and Ozone Productions present the Frankie Reborn Fine Art Print, an electrifying new pinup art print by the renowned Olivia De Berardinis.  In this reimagined variant of Olivia's original piece titled Franky's Bride, mad science and sultry style combine in the laboratory to give a bizarre beauty new life! Model Tiah Eckhardt serves as the face of the iconic monstress as she removes her pink bandages to reveal the beauty of her creation. From the height of her hair to the stiletto heels, Frankie is drop dead gorgeous, boasting a tattoo of the mechanical woman Maria from Metropolis on her calf. The Body Snatcher chair beneath her is based on the captivating designs of artist Martin Meunier, making this beguiling bride truly the sum of her parts!  Each Frankie Reborn Fine Art Print is hand-signed by Olivia herself and features her official embossed Seal of Authenticity along with a hand-signed Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. This high-fidelity reproduction of Olivia's original acrylic on wood painting is available to fans as an unframed giclée with deckled hand-torn edges or in a custom framed presentation. Whether you're a pinup enthusiast or a horror art collector, you won't want to miss adding this Frankenstein creation to your collection!  Unwrap something alluring and bring home the Frankie Reborn Fine Art Print by Olivia De Berardinis today.
